- [ ] `ruff check .` and `ruff format --check .` pass
- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] I added/updated tests where it makes sense
- [ ] I updated docs / `CHANGELOG.md` where relevant
- [ ] My commits follow Conventional Commits
